ques: Compare business class flight options from Lisbon to Singapore for a one-way trip on July 15, 2026, select one of the flights and see which websites offer its booking options. Which one is the cheapest.
answer: For the selected Qatar Airways business-class flight (Lisbon→Singapore, one-way, Jul 15 2026, 1 stop in Doha, 19h20m, ~€2,684), the booking options are Qatar Airways €2,684, Rumbo €2,630, martiGO €2,684, and Gotogate €2,704 — the cheapest is **Rumbo at €2,630**.
